Package fr.maif.requests

Class SpecificFeatureRequest

  • java.lang.Object
    • fr.maif.requests.SpecificFeatureRequest
  • public class SpecificFeatureRequest
extends Object
    Data container that can be used to specify a per feature error/cache strategy for a given query.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      Optional<BooleanCastStrategy> castStrategy  
      Optional<FeatureClientErrorStrategy<?>> errorStrategy  
      String feature  
      Optional<Boolean> ignoreCache

      Whether cache should be ignored this feature

      Error strategy to use for this query

      • feature

        public static SpecificFeatureRequest feature​(String feature)
        Feature id to query
        Parameters:
        feature - feature id
        Returns:
        new specific feature request with provided id

      • ignoreCache

        public SpecificFeatureRequest ignoreCache​(boolean ignoreCache)
        Whether cache should be ignored this feature
        Parameters:
        ignoreCache - if cache should be ignored
        Returns:
        this object updated with given cache strategy

        public SpecificFeatureRequest withErrorStrategy​(FeatureClientErrorStrategy<?> errorStrategy)
        Error strategy to use for this query
        Parameters:
        errorStrategy - error strategy to use
        Returns:
